description: Real Ed25519 signing/verification golden vector. Produces and verifies a complete publish-request body with correct content_hash and signature. Test keypair MUST NOT be used in production.

test_keypair.warning: TEST ONLY. The private seed is publicly known. Never use this keypair for real publications.

vectors.name: Minimal first-version publish request, signed

producer_content.title: Golden test vector — minimal first version

publish_request_body.title: Golden test vector — minimal first version

verification_steps: 1. Strip exclusion set from publish_request_body to produce producer_content.
2. JCS-canonicalize producer_content; result MUST equal expected.canonical_form.
3. SHA-256 of canonical_form (UTF-8 bytes); hex of digest with 'sha256:' prefix MUST equal expected.content_hash.
4. Sign ASCII bytes of expected.content_hash with the test private key; result (raw 64 bytes, base64-encoded) MUST equal expected.signature_value_base64.
5. Verify the signature with the test public key over the ASCII bytes of body.content_hash; verification MUST succeed.
6. Compute lin: + lowercase_hex(SHA-256(registry_assigned.ctx_id)) ; result MUST equal registry_assigned.lineage_id.
